ip_outcome_note: Confirmed Phantump via card name, PokemonTCG.io API (swsh2-14, National Pokedex no. 708, Ghost/Grass), artist sui, and canonical tree-stump-body-with-spirit-face design.

trivia_bullets.text: Two corpus Phantump prints: RBC-014 (sui art, teal-aura-glow eerie-presence register, 2020) vs. CSE-93 (miki kudo art, dim-forest-floating-orbs lonely-spirit register, 2019). Same species, divergent emotional keys: supernatural-power vs. child-abandonment.

Flavor text: 'After a lost child perished in the forest, their spirit possessed a tree stump, causing the spirit's rebirth as this Pokemon.' Darkest origin statement among Grass-type species in the corpus — child death is the canonical mechanism of the species' existence.

Dark Guidance (put a Basic from discard to Bench) is a recursion utility on a 60HP 1-retreat basic. Trevenant trade-evolution line sees use in Mill and disruption strategies; Dark Guidance makes Phantump a recycling engine in those builds.

related_cards.name: Phantump
related_cards.note: alternate corpus print, miki kudo art, lonely-spirit register

related_cards.name: Trevenant
related_cards.note: evolved form Phantump becomes via trade
